items.title: Isn't Wemby's contract salary cap circumvention, too?
items.body_excerpt: You can tell I made this graphic myself because it’s so good. Salary cap circumvention, the practice of manipulating player pay in such a way as to get around luxury taxes, aprons, and cap restrictions, is strictly forbidden in every sport.
